chapter_title.en: Recognizing the Dawn and the Saying Upon Seeing it

text: 1436 - رَوَى عَلِيُّ بْنُ عَطِيَّةَ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ أَنَّهُ قَالَ: «اَلْفَجْرُ هُوَ اَلَّذِي إِذَا رَأَيْتَهُ كَانَ مُعْتَرِضاً كَأَنَّهُ بَيَاضُ نَهَرِ سُورَى.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.1436 - Ali ibn Atiyyah narrated from Abu Abdullah Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) that He said:
"The true Fajr (dawn) is the one that, when you see it, appears spread out horizontally, like the whiteness of the Surā river."
